title: TNT into Sand PRANK Pack
description: This is the PERFECT prank to trap your friends! Check the description for instructions on how to use it and my FAVORITE trap with this!
body:
I was recently looking for a prank to pull off on my friends and I couldn't find a texture pack that turns TNT into something harmless. I got the idea from PlanetLord's "Using a Texture Pack to Trap this SMP" video. Here's a link to that video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fVpg09H_PMY

This texture pack changes the TNT texture into the sand texture. Here is my favorite trap to do with this.

Instructions:

1. Download the texture pack (Only official download link is [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tnt-into-sand-prank] and [https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tnt-into-sand-prank-pack])

2. Rename the folder to something that your friend will believe. (Suggestion is [Critical Hit Particle Fix]

3. Send it to your friend (Use Google Drive or something that works)

4. Have your friend download it and put it into the folder:
This PC > Users > AppData > Roaming > .minecraft > resourcepacks
(or this if they're using Modrinth Launcher):
This PC > Users > AppData > Roaming > com.modrinth.theseus > profiles > (profile name) > resourcepacks
 
Or just type %appdata% in the Run app and go into the folder.

5. Before playing, find a desert, replace a bunch of the sand with TNT. Then make sure you have a way of getting out quickly (that your friend doesn't have) and have a Flint and Steel ready!

6. Get your friend on the server, lure them over to the desert. Then, blow up some of the TNT (make sure you don't have the texture pack on) and watch them BLOW UP when you escape the scene!

This texture pack will surely turn you into the ULTIMATE PRANKSTER in Minecraft!

REMEMBER! ONLY DO THIS TO SOMEONE WHO WON'T GET MAD
